raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Reviewing the section requires checking the logical consistency of the described method and results, such as aligning model specifications across paragraphs.","R1.3":"The delegation involves verifying that claims like performance improvements are supported by the reported experimental outcomes.","R1.4":"Assessing the novelty of GRAPH-REFINE against recent self-feedback works is central to evaluating the contribution.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is expected in a review of this draft section.","R1.7":"Evaluating the accuracy and completeness of citations is crucial, given the references to prior work without specific attributions.","RX.1":"The review should ensure uncertainties, such as variability across seeds, are properly disclosed.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims in the headline results and recommendations is a key aspect of the review.","RX.3":"Ensuring the section adheres to its scope of describing the method and results without extraneous content is important.","RX.4":"Considering potential downstream harms from misclassifications in molecular HIV prediction is peripheral but relevant.","RX.5":"Checking provenance of the benchmark, model, and techniques is essential for traceability in the review."}}

rationale.R1.2: Reviewing the section requires checking the logical consistency of the described method and results, such as aligning model specifications across paragraphs.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation involves verifying that claims like performance improvements are supported by the reported experimental outcomes.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing the novelty of GRAPH-REFINE against recent self-feedback works is central to evaluating the contribution.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is expected in a review of this draft section.
rationale.R1.7: Evaluating the accuracy and completeness of citations is crucial, given the references to prior work without specific attributions.
rationale.RX.1: The review should ensure uncertainties, such as variability across seeds, are properly disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims in the headline results and recommendations is a key aspect of the review.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the section adheres to its scope of describing the method and results without extraneous content is important.
rationale.RX.4: Considering potential downstream harms from misclassifications in molecular HIV prediction is peripheral but relevant.
rationale.RX.5: Checking provenance of the benchmark, model, and techniques is essential for traceability in the review.
